name: 统计与结果报告
description: 用于报告回归结果、显著性、效应大小、交互项、稳健性和子群体模式

expressions.note: 最稳妥的相关表述，不暗示严格因果
expressions.example: Parental wealth is positively associated with college completion.

expressions.en: has a positive and statistically significant coefficient
expressions.note: 直接面向回归表，适合描述系数方向和显著性
expressions.example: The education variable has a positive and statistically significant coefficient.

expressions.note: 比 associated 更强调预测关系，但仍可避免因果断言
expressions.example: Stable employment predicts higher levels of union formation.

expressions.en: is linked to an increase in
expressions.note: 适合描述结果变量上升，语气比 causes 更谨慎
expressions.example: Childcare access is linked to an increase in maternal employment.

expressions.note: 适合 logit 或 odds ratio 语境，避免误写概率
expressions.example: Homeownership corresponds to higher odds of marriage.

expressions.en: is associated with a higher probability of
expressions.note: 适合概率模型或边际效应报告，读者容易理解
expressions.example: College attendance is associated with a higher probability of migration.

expressions.note: 最通用的负向相关表达，不预设机制
expressions.example: Debt is negatively associated with homeownership among young adults.

expressions.en: has a negative and statistically significant coefficient
expressions.note: 适合逐项解释回归表，信息直接完整
expressions.example: The unemployment indicator has a negative and statistically significant coefficient.

expressions.note: 适合描述模型预测的减少，不必声称因果
expressions.example: Precarious work predicts lower levels of life satisfaction.

expressions.en: is linked to a decline in
expressions.note: 突出结果下降，适合描述趋势或处理效应
expressions.example: School closure is linked to a decline in test scores.

expressions.note: 适合二元结果模型，强调 odds 而不是平均值
expressions.example: Informal employment corresponds to lower odds of pension coverage.

expressions.note: 更书面，适合变量之间稳定的反向关系
expressions.example: Job insecurity is inversely related to fertility intentions.

clusters.meaning: 系数不显著/无统计学意义

expressions.note: 最标准表达，适合直接报告显著性结果
expressions.example: The interaction term is not statistically significant.

expressions.en: does not reach conventional levels of significance
expressions.note: 更学术，适合 p 值接近阈值但未过线
expressions.example: The coefficient does not reach conventional levels of significance.

expressions.note: 强调估计值无法与零区分，适合回归系数
expressions.example: The estimate is statistically indistinguishable from zero.

expressions.note: 强调数据中未检测到关系，避免说完全没有关系
expressions.example: The model yields no statistically detectable association for region.

expressions.note: 更谨慎，强调证据不足而非断言关系不存在
expressions.example: The estimates provide little evidence of a cohort difference.

expressions.note: 适合置信区间宽的情况，重点在估计不精确
expressions.example: The subgroup coefficient is estimated imprecisely.

expressions.note: 适合把系数翻成实质含义，连接统计与解释
expressions.example: The coefficient implies that graduates earn five percent more.

expressions.note: 强调效应量大小，适合报告边际效应或差异
expressions.example: The estimated effect amounts to a two-month delay in marriage.

expressions.en: a one-unit increase in X is associated with
expressions.note: 标准连续变量解释，适合清楚连接单位变化
expressions.example: A one-unit increase in insecurity is associated with lower wellbeing.

expressions.note: 强调估计值本身，适合不确定性较高时谨慎表述
expressions.example: The point estimate suggests a modest employment penalty.

expressions.en: the substantive size of the effect is
expressions.note: 用于强调实际意义，不只看统计显著性
expressions.example: The substantive size of the effect is economically meaningful.

expressions.note: 适合通过参照物解释效应大小，增强可读性
expressions.example: The magnitude is comparable to the effect of parental education.

expressions.note: 最常用，适合句首或句中说明控制项
expressions.example: After controlling for age, the gender gap remains large.

expressions.note: 更紧凑、更学术，适合表示排除某些因素后的关系
expressions.example: The association persists net of family background.

expressions.note: 常见于统计和流行病学写法，语气中性
expressions.example: Adjusting for prior achievement reduces the school effect.

expressions.note: 强调其他条件不变，适合解释模型含义
expressions.example: Holding education constant, migrants earn less than natives.

expressions.en: once X is included in the model
expressions.note: 强调加入某变量前后的模型变化
expressions.example: Once occupation is included in the model, the coefficient declines.

expressions.note: 更简洁但抽象，适合高级统计语境
expressions.example: Conditional on prior income, the wealth gradient remains steep.

expressions.note: 直接报告交互项显著性，适合表格解释
expressions.example: The interaction term is significant in the full model.

expressions.note: 面向读者更直观，适合解释交互含义
expressions.example: The effect varies by parental education.

expressions.note: 适合说明交互方向和目标子群体
expressions.example: The association is stronger among first-generation students.

expressions.en: X moderates the relationship between Y and Z
expressions.note: 标准调节效应写法，适合理论和统计同时说明
expressions.example: Gender moderates the relationship between debt and marriage.

expressions.note: 适合比较斜率或社会梯度在群体间的差异
expressions.example: The education gradient differs across birth cohorts.

expressions.note: 强调差异主要来自某些群体，适合深入结果解释
expressions.example: Heterogeneity is concentrated among workers without college degrees.

expressions.note: 最通用，适合比较加入变量前后的模型表现
expressions.example: Adding school fixed effects improves model fit.

expressions.en: provides a better fit to the data
expressions.note: 读者友好，强调模型与数据更匹配
expressions.example: The nonlinear specification provides a better fit to the data.

expressions.note: 适合 AIC/BIC 场景，表达具体模型比较指标
expressions.example: The random-effects model reduces the information criterion.

expressions.en: accounts for a larger share of variance
expressions.note: 适合 R-squared 或方差解释语境
expressions.example: Family background accounts for a larger share of variance.

expressions.note: 适合说明复杂模型并未显著改善拟合
expressions.example: The interaction model offers little improvement over the baseline.

expressions.en: is preferred by the fit statistics
expressions.note: 强调选择依据来自拟合指标，而非主观判断
expressions.example: The cohort model is preferred by the fit statistics.

expressions.note: 最常用，适合替代样本、变量和模型检验
expressions.example: The results are robust to alternative measures of income.

expressions.note: 更自然，适合描述限制样本或换模型后的结果
expressions.example: The pattern holds when we restrict the sample to urban residents.

expressions.note: 强调核心结论没有变化，而非每个系数相同
expressions.example: The conclusions are unchanged after excluding outliers.

expressions.note: 适合补充检验，强调估计值接近
expressions.example: Sensitivity checks yield similar estimates across specifications.

expressions.en: the finding is not driven by
expressions.note: 用于排除某个替代解释或特殊群体
expressions.example: The finding is not driven by high-income households.

expressions.note: 强调不同模型设定下关系持续存在
expressions.example: The association persists across specifications with fixed effects.

expressions.note: 强调效果不小，但比 large 更正式
expressions.example: The policy has a sizeable effect on enrollment.

expressions.note: 强调存在但不大，适合避免夸张解读
expressions.example: The training program shows a modest effect on wages.

expressions.note: 强调实际意义，不只依赖 p 值
expressions.example: The gender gap represents a substantively meaningful difference.

expressions.note: 强调差异很小，适合显著但实际意义弱的结果
expressions.example: The two estimates imply a negligible difference in completion rates.

expressions.note: 比 sizeable 更谨慎，适合中等但值得关注的效应
expressions.example: The estimate points to an effect of nontrivial size.

expressions.en: the effect is small in absolute terms
expressions.note: 强调绝对大小有限，常用于平衡显著性解释
expressions.example: The effect is small in absolute terms but consistent across models.

expressions.note: 统计报告中最常用，强调系数变小
expressions.example: The coefficient attenuates after adding occupation controls.

expressions.note: 适合量化削弱幅度，结果更精确
expressions.example: The estimate is reduced by nearly one-third.

expressions.en: part of the association is explained by
expressions.note: 适合中介解释，避免声称完全解释
expressions.example: Part of the association is explained by school quality.

expressions.en: the effect is partially mediated by
expressions.note: 标准中介语言，适合明确讨论机制变量
expressions.example: The effect is partially mediated by employment stability.

expressions.note: 读者友好，适合描述群体差距变化
expressions.example: The gender gap narrows after adjusting for occupation.

expressions.note: 强调加入某组变量后关系大幅消失，语气较强
expressions.example: The association is largely absorbed by family background controls.

expressions.note: 适合从多个结果中概括出总体规律
expressions.example: A clear pattern emerges across birth cohorts.

expressions.en: the estimates follow a similar pattern
expressions.note: 强调不同模型或群体结果相似
expressions.example: The estimates follow a similar pattern among men and women.

expressions.note: 适合描述随阶层、教育或收入递变的趋势
expressions.example: We observe a gradient in college completion by parental wealth.

expressions.en: the pattern is most pronounced among
expressions.note: 强调模式在某群体中最明显，适合异质性描述
expressions.example: The pattern is most pronounced among low-income households.

expressions.note: 适合从结果引出解释，语气比 show 更谨慎
expressions.example: The results point to widening cohort inequality.

expressions.note: 适合描述分布变化，而非单一均值变化
expressions.example: The distribution shifts toward later ages at first birth.

expressions.note: 最简洁，适合句中快速限定子群体
expressions.example: Among rural youth, the education gradient is steeper.

expressions.note: 更明确地标出子样本，适合结果报告
expressions.example: For the subgroup of single mothers, the penalty is larger.

expressions.note: 强调在特定总体内部，适合避免重复群体名称
expressions.example: Within this population, migration rates vary sharply by education.

expressions.note: 强调关系主要出现在某群体，而非均匀存在
expressions.example: The association is concentrated among workers in service jobs.

expressions.note: 语气较强，强调只在某群体中出现
expressions.example: The pattern is confined to respondents without college degrees.

expressions.note: 适合概括多个子群体之间差异明显
expressions.example: Results differ markedly across immigrant generations.
